Rotatable Stand: This silicone for iPad 5/6 Air 1/2 Pro 9.7" case folds 180° and rotates 360°, so you can place it wherever you want when you're watching a film, playing a game, and making a call to a friend
Adjustable Shoulder Strap: The case for iPad 5th/6th Air 1/2 Pro 9.7" comes with an adjustable shoulder strap, you can travel with it slung across your body or hang it from your car seat to watch

Silicone Material: This cute for Apple 5/6 generation Air 1/2 Pro 9.7" case is made of silicone, it is rugged and soft to the touch, protecting the device from drops and scratches while providing a comfortable grip
Cute Cartoon Design: The unicorn for iPad 5th/6th gen Air1/2 Pro 9.7" case features a kid-friendly design that's both fun and practical, with bright cartoon graphics that girls boys will love
